description: TMDB (The Movie Database) provides movie, TV, person, and image metadata plus related account features such as favorites, ratings, watchlists, and lists. Its service is used by applications to fetch entertainment data and associated images.
summary: themoviedb.org exposes one documented HTTP API surface: the TMDB v3 REST API at `https://api.themoviedb.org`, authenticated with either a v3 API key or a bearer read-access token, with session-based extensions for user and guest actions.
